title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/memory_layers.py (第 376 至 520 行，共 570 行) ---
 376 |     def store_item(self, item: MemoryItem) -> str:
 377 |         """
 378 |         存储 MemoryItem 到长期记忆。
 379 | 
 380 |         Args:
 381 |             item: 长期知识条目
 382 | 
 383 |         Returns:
 384 |             存储的文件路径
 385 |         """
 386 |         timestamp = item.updated_at.replace(":", "-").replace(" ", "_")
 387 |         filename = f"memory_item_{item.id}_{timestamp}.json"
 388 |         file_path = self.storage_dir / filename
 389 | 
 390 |         try:
 391 |             with open(file_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
 392 |                 json.dump(item.to_dict(), f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
 393 | 
 394 |             old_file = self.item_index.get(item.id)
 395 |             if old_file and old_file != file_path and old_file.exists():
 396 |                 old_file.unlink()
 397 | 
 398 |             self.item_index[item.id] = file_path
 399 |             self._remove_id_from_inverted_index(self.item_inverted_index, item.id)
 400 | 
 401 |             keywords = self._extract_item_keywords(item.to_dict())
 402 |             for keyword in keywords:
 403 |                 if keyword not in self.item_inverted_index:
 404 |                     self.item_inverted_index[keyword] = []
 405 |                 if item.id not in self.item_inverted_index[keyword]:
 406 |                     self.item_inverted_index[keyword].append(item.id)
 407 | 
 408 |             self._save_index()
 409 |             return str(file_path)
 410 |         except Exception as e:
 411 |             print(f"⚠️ 存储 MemoryItem 失败: {e}")
 412 |             return ""
 413 | 
 414 |     def retrieve_item(self, item_id: str) -> Optional[MemoryItem]:
 415 |         """根据 item_id 检索 MemoryItem。"""
 416 |         file_path = self.item_index.get(item_id)
 417 |         if not file_path or not file_path.exists():
 418 |             return None
 419 | 
 420 |         try:
 421 |             with open(file_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
 422 |                 data = json.load(f)
 423 |                 return MemoryItem.from_dict(data)
 424 |         except Exception as e:
 425 |             print(f"⚠️ 读取 MemoryItem 失败: {e}")
 426 |             return None
 427 | 
 428 |     def search_items(self, query: str, top_k: int = 10, include_archived: bool = False) -> List[MemoryRecallResult]:
 429 |         """关键词检索 MemoryItem，返回统一召回结果。"""
 430 |         query_keywords = self._tokenize(query)
 431 |         if not query_keywords:
 432 |             return []
 433 | 
 434 |         scores: Dict[str, float] = {}
 435 |         matched_terms: Dict[str, List[str]] = {}
 436 |         for keyword in query_keywords:
 437 |             for item_id in self.item_inverted_index.get(keyword, []):
 438 |                 scores[item_id] = scores.get(item_id, 0.0) + 1.0
 439 |                 matched_terms.setdefault(item_id, []).append(keyword)
 440 | 
 441 |         results: List[MemoryRecallResult] = []
 442 |         for item_id, keyword_score in scores.items():
 443 |             item = self.retrieve_item(item_id)
 444 |             if not item:
 445 |                 continue
 446 |             if not include_archived and item.status != MemoryStatus.ACTIVE.value:
 447 |                 continue
 448 | 
 449 |             normalized_score = keyword_score + item.importance + item.confidence * 0.5
 450 |             reason = "匹配关键词: " + ", ".join(sorted(set(matched_terms.get(item_id, []))))
 451 |             results.append(MemoryRecallResult(
 452 |                 item=item,
 453 |                 score=normalized_score,
 454 |                 source="long_term_items",
 455 |                 reason=reason,
 456 |             ))
 457 | 
 458 |         results.sort(key=lambda result: result.score, reverse=True)
 459 |         return results[:top_k]
 460 | 
 461 |     def get_all_items(self) -> List[MemoryItem]:
 462 |         """获取所有 MemoryItem。"""
 463 |         items = []
 464 |         for...
